allow: PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\Admin\\Desktop\\Pagina ANEIMERA PERU"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force | Select-Object FullName, @{N='Size';E={$_.Length}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)
